user.title: Teslemetry Entities
user.description: Select the Teslemetry entities for your Tesla Powerwall.

data_description.teslemetry_operation_mode: Select entity that controls Powerwall mode (self_consumption, backup, etc.)
data_description.teslemetry_backup_reserve: Select entity that sets backup reserve percentage
data_description.teslemetry_soc: Sensor showing current battery state of charge
data_description.teslemetry_grid_power: Sensor showing grid power flow (positive=import, negative=export)

pricing.title: Pricing Entities
pricing.description: Select the pricing entities (e.g., from Amber Electric or Octopus Energy).

data_description.pricing_general_forecast: Forecast sensor with upcoming buy prices
data_description.pricing_feed_in_forecast: Forecast sensor with upcoming sell prices
data_description.pricing_price_spike: Binary sensor indicating price spike events

solcast.title: Solcast & Notifications
solcast.description: Select the Solcast forecast entities and notification service.

data_description.solcast_forecast_today: Solcast forecast for today's solar production
data_description.solcast_forecast_tomorrow: Solcast forecast for tomorrow's solar production
data_description.sun_entity: Sun entity for sunrise/sunset times (usually sun.sun)

init.title: LocalShift Settings
init.description: Configure demand window timing, price thresholds, and battery settings.

data_description.demand_window_start: Time when demand window begins (battery held for evening peak)
data_description.demand_window_end: Time when demand window ends (normal operation resumes)
data_description.manual_override_timeout: Hours before manual mode automatically returns to self-consumption (0 = never)
data_description.cheap_price_percentile: Price percentile threshold for grid charging (e.g., 25 = charge when price is in bottom 25%)
data_description.max_pre_charge_price: Maximum price ($/kWh) to pay for pre-charging battery
data_description.cheap_price_deadband: Minimum price difference ($/kWh) to start/stop charging (prevents rapid cycling)
data_description.spike_price_percentile: Price percentile for spike discharge (e.g., 75 = discharge at top 25% prices)
data_description.battery_target: Target SOC % for demand window (battery reserved for evening peak)
data_description.minimum_target_soc: Minimum SOC % maintained during discharge modes (spike, proactive export)
data_description.load_weight_recent: Weight given to recent load vs historical average (0.67 = 2/3 recent, 1/3 historical)
data_description.export_price_margin: Minimum profit margin ($/kWh) for battery export when grid import needed to replace
data_description.optimization_mode: Optimizer objective mode: self_consumption prioritizes keeping energy for home use; arbitrage prioritizes buy-low/sell-high behavior

price_cheap_effective.name: Price Cheap Effective
price_cheap_effective.description: Dynamic cheap price threshold adjusted for urgency. Battery will grid charge when prices fall below this level.

price_cheap_charge_stop.name: Price Cheap Charge Stop
price_cheap_charge_stop.description: Price threshold plus deadband where grid charging stops. Prevents rapid cycling on price fluctuations.

solar_weighted_avg_fit.name: Solar Weighted Avg FIT
solar_weighted_avg_fit.description: Solar-production-weighted average feed-in tariff. Shows expected export revenue rate for remaining solar today.

battery_mode.name: Battery Mode
battery_mode.description: Current battery automation mode (self_consumption, grid_charging, spike_discharge, etc.). Shows what LocalShift is doing.

forecast_battery.name: Forecast Battery
forecast_battery.description: Predicted battery SOC based on solar forecast and consumption profile. Shows expected charge level through the day.

cost_electricity_net.name: Cost Electricity Net
cost_electricity_net.description: Net electricity cost today (import cost minus export revenue). Tracks daily energy expenses.

decision_log.name: Decision Log
decision_log.description: Recent battery mode change decisions with reasons. Shows why LocalShift changed modes.

forecast_history.name: Forecast History
forecast_history.description: Historical forecast predictions stored for accuracy comparison. Used to improve future predictions.

forecast_daily.name: Forecast Daily
forecast_daily.description: Full 24-hour forecast with SOC, solar, and consumption data. Core data for dashboards.

forecast_prices.name: Forecast Prices
forecast_prices.description: Buy and sell price forecasts for the next 24 hours. Shows upcoming price movements.

forecast_grid.name: Forecast Grid
forecast_grid.description: Forecasted grid import/export amounts. Shows when battery will need grid power or export surplus.

forecast_diagnostics.name: Forecast Diagnostics
forecast_diagnostics.description: Technical debug data for forecast system. Shows consumption profiles and weather correlation.

target_soc_minimum.name: Target SOC Minimum
target_soc_minimum.description: Minimum SOC maintained during discharge modes. Battery won't discharge below this level.

excess_solar.name: Excess Solar
excess_solar.description: Forecasted excess solar energy available for discretionary loads. Shows how much solar you can use for EV, pool, etc.

load_shift_signal.name: Load Shift Signal
load_shift_signal.description: Actionable signal for load-shifting automations (INCREASE_LOAD, REDUCE_LOAD, MAINTAIN_LOAD, HOLD).

forecast_accuracy.name: Forecast Accuracy
forecast_accuracy.description: Accuracy of past forecast predictions vs actual outcomes. Shows how reliable predictions are.

integration_status.name: Integration Status
integration_status.description: Overall integration health (ok, degraded, error). Quick indicator if everything is working.

entity_health.name: Entity Health
entity_health.description: Detailed health status for all tracked entities. Shows which entities are available or have issues.

baseline_load_profile.name: Baseline Load Profile
baseline_load_profile.description: Non-HVAC baseline load by hour. Shows your home's base consumption without heating/cooling.

learning_status.name: Learning Status
learning_status.description: Current learning system phase (observing, tuning, optimizing). Shows if the system is learning your patterns.

decision_quality.name: Decision Quality
decision_quality.description: Today's average decision quality score as a percentage. Higher is better.

learning_decision_history.name: Learning Decision History
learning_decision_history.description: Recent mode decisions with outcomes. Shows what the learning system tried and what happened.

price_spike_coming.name: Price Spike Coming
price_spike_coming.description: A price spike is forecast within the lookahead window. Prepare for high prices.

discharge_forced.name: Discharge Forced
discharge_forced.description: Battery is currently force discharging to export energy at high prices.

charge_forced.name: Charge Forced
charge_forced.description: Battery is currently force charging from the grid at low prices.

charge_boost.name: Charge Boost
charge_boost.description: Battery is boost charging at 5kW rate. Used when time is limited before demand window.

price_expensive_coming.name: Price Expensive Coming
price_expensive_coming.description: An expensive price period is forecast within the lookahead window.

solar_can_reach_target.name: Solar Can Reach Target
solar_can_reach_target.description: Solar forecast indicates battery can reach target SOC by demand window without grid charging.

charge_boost_needed.name: Charge Boost Needed
charge_boost_needed.description: Standard 3.3kW charge rate is insufficient; 5kW boost charge is needed to reach target in time.

demand_window.name: Demand Window
demand_window.description: Evening demand window is active. Battery is held for peak period usage.

excess_solar_available.name: Excess Solar Available
excess_solar_available.description: Excess solar is available now. Good time to run discretionary loads (EV, pool, appliances).

tesla_override_active.name: Tesla Override Active
tesla_override_active.description: Tesla has taken control (Storm Watch, Grid Event, or VPP). LocalShift commands are ignored until event ends.

automation_enabled.name: Automation Enabled
automation_enabled.description: Master toggle for all LocalShift automation. Turn off to return Powerwall to self-consumption mode.

spike_discharge_enabled.name: Spike Discharge Enabled
spike_discharge_enabled.description: Allow battery discharge during price spike events. Export energy when prices are highest.

spike_discharge_conservative.name: Conservative Spike Discharge
spike_discharge_conservative.description: Reserve extra SOC during spike discharge for demand window. Keeps more battery for evening peak.

dry_run.name: Dry Run
dry_run.description: Simulate mode changes without actually controlling Powerwall. Useful for testing configuration.

demand_window_block.name: Demand Window Block
demand_window_block.description: Block grid imports during evening demand window. Hold battery for peak period usage.

allow_dw_entry_under_target.name: Allow Early DW Entry
allow_dw_entry_under_target.description: Allow entering demand window below target if solar forecast can reach target during window.

notify_transitions.name: Notify Mode Transitions
notify_transitions.description: Send notifications when battery mode changes (e.g., grid charging started, spike discharge activated).

notify_daily_summary.name: Notify Daily Summary
notify_daily_summary.description: Send daily summary notification with cost savings and battery performance.

notify_manual_actions.name: Notify Manual Actions
notify_manual_actions.description: Send notifications when manual mode buttons are pressed (force charge, force discharge, etc.).

notify_alerts.name: Notify Alerts
notify_alerts.description: Send alert notifications for important events (automation disabled, Tesla override, errors).

enable_learning.name: Enable Learning
enable_learning.description: Enable active optimization by the learning system. Adjusts parameters based on your usage patterns.

cheap_price_percentile.name: Cheap Price Percentile
cheap_price_percentile.description: Price percentile threshold for grid charging (e.g., 25 = charge when price is in bottom 25%)

max_pre_charge_price.name: Max Pre-charge Price
max_pre_charge_price.description: Maximum price ($/kWh) to pay for pre-charging battery

cheap_price_deadband.name: Price Deadband
cheap_price_deadband.description: Minimum price difference ($/kWh) to start/stop charging (prevents rapid cycling)

forecast_lookahead_hours.name: Forecast Lookahead
forecast_lookahead_hours.description: Hours ahead to scan for price spikes and cheap periods

battery_target.name: Battery Target
battery_target.description: Target SOC % for demand window (battery reserved for evening peak)

load_weight_recent.name: Recent Load Weight
load_weight_recent.description: Weight given to recent load vs historical average (0.67 = 2/3 recent, 1/3 historical)

spike_price_percentile.name: Spike Price Percentile
spike_price_percentile.description: Price percentile for spike discharge (e.g., 75 = discharge at top 25% prices)

minimum_target_soc.name: Minimum Target SOC
minimum_target_soc.description: Minimum SOC % maintained during discharge modes (spike, proactive export)

export_price_margin.name: Export Price Margin
export_price_margin.description: Minimum profit margin ($/kWh) for battery export when grid import needed to replace

update_forecast.name: Update Forecast
update_forecast.description: Force refresh of forecast data and clear historical load cache.

reset_learning.name: Reset Learning Data
reset_learning.description: Clear all learning data and restart observation phase. Use if patterns have changed significantly.

battery_mode.name: Battery Mode
battery_mode.description: Select battery operating mode. Changing this disables automation and applies manual control.

optimization_mode.name: Optimization Mode
optimization_mode.description: Choose optimizer objective strategy: self_consumption or arbitrage.
